params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: consumerActionId
params.description: Filter subscriptions by consumer action ID

items.docs: Returns a list of all service hook subscriptions in the organization. Each subscription specifies an event type, publisher, consumer (webhook endpoint), and filter conditions. Supports optional filtering by publisher and consumer.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

items.docs: Creates a new service hook subscription. The subscription defines which event to listen for (publisher + eventType), filter conditions to narrow the event scope (e.g., a specific project or branch), and the consumer endpoint to deliver the notification to.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

items.docs: Returns detailed information about a specific service hook subscription, including its publisher, event type, consumer configuration, filter inputs, and current status.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: subscriptionId
params.description: GUID of the subscription to update

items.docs: Updates properties of an existing service hook subscription such as the consumer endpoint URL, filter conditions, or resource detail settings.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: subscriptionId
params.description: GUID of the subscription to delete

items.docs: Permanently deletes a service hook subscription. After deletion, the consumer endpoint will no longer receive notifications for the configured event type.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

items.docs: Returns a list of all available publishers (event sources) that can be subscribed to. The primary publisher for Azure DevOps events is 'tfs'. Each publisher defines what event types it can produce.

info.name: Azure DevOps List event types for a publisher

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

items.docs: Returns all event types defined by a specific publisher. Each event type includes its ID, name, description, and the input parameters that can be used to filter notifications.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

items.docs: Returns a list of all available consumers that can receive service hook notifications. Consumers include webhooks (httpRequest), Azure Service Bus, Azure Storage, Microsoft Teams, and other integration targets.

info.name: Azure DevOps Send a test notification

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: useRealData
params.description: Whether to use real event data or synthetic test data

items.docs: Sends a test notification to verify that a service hook subscription is correctly configured and the consumer endpoint is reachable. Returns the result of the delivery attempt including HTTP status code and response body.
